description: A simple and light-weighted google calendar importer, allow injecting the events / tasks of a day automatically to your daily notes, or import it to anywhere with a command.

name: Google Calendar Importer

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Version 1.1.1

  ###  Improvements

  - **Enhanced command validation**: Insert command now uses `editorCheckCallback` with `MarkdownView` validation to ensure it only works in markdown files, not in Canvas cards or other editor types
  - **Fixed date input behavior**: When manually inserting a calendar block and leaving the date input blank, it now correctly uses today's date instead of defaulting to the daily note's filename date

  ###  Bug Fixes

  - Fixed unexpected behavior where blank date input would use the note's filename date instead of today's actual date

  ###  Notes

  This release addresses additional feedback from the Obsidian community plugin review process, improving code quality and user experience.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
##  Version 1.1.0

  ###  Improvements

  - **Better file modification handling**: Now uses Editor API when files are in edit mode for better performance and UX
  - **Improved calendar block placement**: Calendar blocks are now inserted at the end of files to avoid breaking frontmatter
  - **Smarter command execution**: Commands now use `checkCallback` to only show when applicable
  - **Better UI components**: Buttons now use `ButtonComponent.setCta()` for consistent styling

  ###  Bug Fixes

  - **Fixed auto-insert timing issue**: Added delay to ensure calendar blocks insert into the correct file when switching between notes
  - **Fixed date handling**: "Leave blank for today" now correctly uses today's actual date
  - **Fixed async handling**: Auto-insert on file-open now properly awaits completion

  ###  Code Quality

  - Updated UI text to follow sentence case convention
  - Removed "settings" from settings headings per Obsidian guidelines

  ### 📝Notes

  This release addresses all feedback from the Obsidian community plugin review process.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Initial Release - Google Calendar Importer v1.0.0

  ## Features

  - **🗓️ Automatic Daily Notes Integration** - Calendar events automatically appear when you open daily notes
  - **📝 Manual Import Commands** - Insert calendar blocks anywhere in your vault with simple commands
  - **🔄 Live Calendar Blocks** - Configurable markdown code blocks that render your events
  - **🔐 Secure OAuth Integration** - Safe authentication with Google Calendar using OAuth 2.0

  ## Getting Started

  1. **Setup Google Cloud Project** with Calendar API enabled
  2. **Configure OAuth credentials** in plugin settings
  3. **Authenticate with Google** and start importing your calendar!

  ## Requirements

  - Obsidian v0.15.0+
  - Desktop version of Obsidian
  - Google Calendar account
  - Google Cloud Project with Calendar API

  ## Links

  - [Setup Guide](https://github.com/lexafaxine/google-calendar-importer#setup)
  - [Documentation](https://github.com/lexafaxine/google-calendar-importer#readme)
  - [Report Issues](https://github.com/lexafaxine/google-calendar-importer/issues)

  Thanks for trying Google Calendar Importer! 🙏
